hooks.command: script="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.codex/hooks/scripts/wiki_session_start.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script" wiki-index; else echo '{}'; fi
script="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.codex/hooks/scripts/wiki_session_start.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script" git-context; else echo '{}'; fi
script="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.codex/hooks/scripts/wiki_stop_hook.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script"; else echo '{}'; fi
